title: Add a typed controller ledger for ACP, reports, and external worker jobs
objective: Design and implement a typed controller/router state ledger that tracks workspace, terminal, ACP session id, chosen runtime, report paths, and Jules job ids instead of relying on a transient in-memory terminal map.
context: Newgate UI currently remembers only workspace to terminal mappings in memory.
ACP hook reports already exist under .gemini/pcc-reports but no product code reads them.
The future controller layer needs stable state for delegation, retries, and UI status.
constraints: Do not break the current Newgate sidebar commands.
Keep the first pass minimal: typed schema, persistence boundary, and read/write helpers.
Treat Gemini CLI ACP as the primary execution lane and Jules as an external worker lane.
required_evidence: Concrete ledger type or schema covering workspace, ACP session id, runtime, report files, and external job ids.
Code references for where the ledger is written and read.
Validation or tests proving the state survives beyond a single in-memory map.
success_criteria: A typed ledger abstraction exists in product code.
Newgate controller state is no longer implicit-only state.
The design supports future report-reader and job-status UI work without redesign.

next_actions.allow: Implement the ledger and add targeted persistence tests.
next_actions.review: Narrow the ledger scope to the minimum fields needed for ACP and report tracking.
next_actions.reject: Rewrite the task to separate typed schema from persistence implementation.
next_actions.retry: Fix runtime or config issues and rerun the same task.
